description_long: This object is a wooden barrel-like structure mounted on a vertical post, featuring a cylindrical body with reinforced metal bands at the top and bottom. The wood is rendered in a medium brown tone with visible grain, giving it a rustic, weathered appearance. Two short, stubby wooden arms protrude horizontally from either side, one of which has a dangling rope or strap attached. The top of the barrel is capped with a smaller, raised cylindrical section, also banded with metal, suggesting a lid or reinforced opening. The front and back faces display a small, square metallic plate or latch, possibly for securing the lid or for decorative purposes. The overall construction and details suggest it could serve as a decorative urban object, a training dummy, or a thematic container in a street or park setting.
description: A rustic wooden barrel with metal bands, mounted on a post and featuring short side arms and a small top lid. It has a weathered look and decorative or functional metal accents.
description_view_0: Front view shows the barrel's cylindrical body, both side arms, and a dangling rope on the right arm.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the square metal plate on the front and the vertical post supporting the barrel.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the barrel, both arms, and the rope detail more clearly.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the square metal plate and the post, mirroring view 1 but from the back.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops at top and bottom
